_comment: NPC: Zhang Hu (张虎). Canon ID: N148. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Zhang Hu

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Hey! You're new here, aren't you? Good. We need more disciples who can actually fight. The beasts near the Spirit Herb Garden have been restless lately.
If you're heading to the Sword Peak, watch your step. The formations there are old and some of the paths are unstable.
Brother, have you eaten at the dining hall yet? The food is terrible, but it's better than nothing.

sect_tasks.description: Zhang Hu cracks his knuckles: 'The spirit beasts near the herb garden have been aggressive lately. I need arrows and an iron sword to clear the den. Help me out and I will share whatever loot we find — those beasts sometimes carry spirit stones.'

Zhang Hu points toward the peak: 'The Sword Peak formations are old and some paths are collapsing. I need coal for lantern fuel and iron to reinforce the railings. If you supply the materials, I will handle the dangerous climbing.'
